title: euphorbia dulcis subsp. incompta
intro: Euphorbia dulcis subsp. incompta, also known as the bitter cassava or sweet cassava, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family that is native to South America. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Euphorbia dulcis subsp. incompta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
